meta.description: End-to-end orchestration for the logistics target pipeline. Python does the analytical core (source, score, profile, export); this n8n graph moves the output between systems on a schedule. Credential IDs, CRM object names and the enrichment endpoint are PLACEHOLDERS - they are the open questions to confirm with the client before this runs live. Import into n8n, then fill the nodes marked TODO.
meta.author: Allen Guo
meta.stage: reference skeleton - not yet wired to live credentials

nodes.name: Weekly trigger
nodes.notes: Refresh the universe weekly. Registries and Form 5500 update slowly, so weekly is plenty.

nodes.name: Run Python pipeline
nodes.notes: Source -> dedupe -> score -> profile -> CRM CSVs. Deterministic, auditable. This is the analytical core; everything after this node just moves its output.

nodes.name: Enrich contact (Apollo) - TODO creds
nodes.notes: DISABLED until the client confirms an enrichment seat. domain -> named contact + verified email. Swap the URL for ZoomInfo/Cognism if that is what they hold; the shape is the same. If no seat exists, leave disabled and the email stays a manual step.

nodes.name: Upsert to CRM - TODO object map
nodes.notes: Upsert on tgt_dedupe_key (EIN or domain), so a re-run updates rather than duplicates. If the CRM is Affinity or DealCloud rather than HubSpot, replace this node with that service's node - the field mapping is in AUTOMATION.md.

values.content: Write a 90-word first-touch email to {{ $json["First name"] }} at {{ $json["Associated company"] }}, an independent logistics firm. One specific, true hook from the profile. No fabricated numbers. Warm, brief, from a junior analyst at an advisory firm exploring whether they would ever consider a conversation.

nodes.name: Draft outreach copy (Claude)
nodes.notes: Claude writes the language, not the data. The profile facts are passed in; the model only phrases them. Same honesty rule as the rest of the pipeline: no invented figures.

nodes.name: Create mail draft - human sends
nodes.notes: DRAFT only, never send. A person reviews and sends from their own mailbox. Swap for the Microsoft Outlook node if the team is on M365. Gate every draft against the do-not-contact / current-client list before this node - that list is an open item with the client.

main.node: Upsert to CRM - TODO object map
